topic: Line 3 LOW LABEL warning before run-out

messages.text: controller is showing LOW LABEL on line 3, still running for now
that's the low-label sensor at the supply reel telling you the roll is near the end. it's a warning, not a stop
usually a few hundred labels. stage a fresh roll now. when it hits MISSING LABELS / run-out it'll fault and stop the web
swapped the roll at a clean splice, rethreaded per the diagram, warning cleared
good. splice with the web flat so it tracks through the peel tip, otherwise you'll trip BROKEN WEB
